jobs.title: Modern Showroom Interior Design
jobs.description:
I'm looking for a skilled interior designer to create a modern design for my showroom, focusing on the display area. The design should be functional and visually appealing, integrating the following elements:

- Lighting: Create an inviting and highlight key products.
- Shelving Units: Design and incorporate functional, stylish shelving.
- Color Scheme: Develop a cohesive, modern color palette.

Ideal skills and experience:
- Proven interior design expertise, especially in modern styles.
- Strong knowledge of lighting, shelving design, and color theory.
- Portfolio showcasing similar projects.

jobs.title: CorelDRAW Vector Illustration Project
jobs.description:
I’m looking for a skilled CorelDRAW artist to turn my concept into a clean, fully-scalable vector illustration. The subject matter and style will be shared once we agree to proceed, but expect a mix of crisp line work and rich colour that must remain editable inside CorelDRAW (.cdr).

There’s no fixed deadline, so you can focus on quality rather than speed. When you reply, please attach or link to past CorelDRAW vector pieces that demonstrate your range with shapes, gradients, and precise node control—those examples will help me judge fit quickly.

Final deliverables:
• Native .cdr file with o

jobs.title: Formal Shoe CAD Pattern Design
jobs.description:
I’m assembling a small catalogue of men’s formal footwear and need a CAD-savvy pattern maker who can start from a blank page. My immediate scope covers three classic styles—Oxfords, Loafers and Derbies—so I’ll be commissioning separate digital patterns for each.

Here’s what I’m after:

• Completely original pattern files, built from last measurements I’ll provide, with no reliance on pre-existing sketches or photos.  
• Accurate stitching, lasting and cutting lines ready for prototyping, delivered in an industry-standard format (AutoCAD).  
• Graded sizing once the base pattern is approved.
skills: 3D Design3D Drafting3D Modelling3D Print DesignAutoCADCAD/CAMPattern MakingProduct Design

jobs.title: AutoCAD Drafts & Logo Design
jobs.description:
My company needs two creative streams handled together. First, every project we take on requires precise 2D plans and matching 3D models built in AutoCAD. These drawings will form the technical backbone of upcoming client presentations, so clean layer management and accurate scaling are critical throughout the workflow.  

Second, we are refreshing our brand identity and a new company logo is at the centre of that effort. I want a logo that translates well from print to digital, supplied in vector (AI / EPS) and web-ready (PNG / SVG) formats with any supporting colour codes and fonts documente
skills: 2D Drafting3D Modelling3D RenderingAutoCADGraphic DesignLogo DesignVector Design

jobs.title: Meta Ads Audience Setup
jobs.description:
The creative pieces, copy, and overall offer are already finalised—I simply need a Meta Ads specialist to get the campaigns live and tuned for maximum website visits. Because I don’t yet have email lists, pixel data, or follower look-alikes to lean on, your job will revolve around building interest-based audiences from scratch, structuring the ad sets, and launching the campaign inside Ads Manager.

Scope of work  
• Analyse my niche and suggest interest clusters, behaviors, and layered targeting that will bring qualified traffic.  
• Create the full campaign structure (campaign, ad sets, ads)
